_comment: CPI YoY 6.9% vs 6.7% consensus — modest surprise during inflation ramp (release 2021-12-10).

source.actual_release: CPI-U, All items, 12-month change — November 2021 release

expected_band.rationale_pending_trader: SRS CLS-001 ECDF: |deviation|=|6.9-6.7|=0.2pp. Count of historical surprises ≤ 0.2 in the 30-month window: 27 out of 30 (the three surprises of 0.4, 0.5, and 0.4 exceed 0.2), so ecdf_rank=27, severity=27/30=0.90. Modest 0.2pp upside surprise during inflation ramp. Ranked high (90th percentile) because historically most CPI surprises were 0.0-0.1pp. The current tanh implementation (~0.49) understates: the surprise is unusual relative to history. ECDF 0.90 is correct.
